description: Style Notefabindia specialises in natural, craft-based contemporary pieces, while also providing rural craftsmen and women a platform to use traditional dyeing and fabric printing techniques. Capturing the essence of Indian roots, crafted with a focus on the traditional, this kurta sets the tone for a contemporary trend with an ethnic aesthetic. The embroidery has been stitched by hand using a kantha style. For the conservative at heart, this piece can be worn with leggings and delicate sandals. For a boho chick meets rebel style, colour block this with bright capris.Product DetailsCream silk kurta with a round split neckline, pink kantha embroidery detail at slit and cuffs, bracelet length sleeves and a vented hemMaterial and Care100% silk in a lightweight crisp fabric with a sheenDry clean only Size and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33Ã?Â?Ã?Â¢Ã?Â¢?Ã?Â¬Ã?Â¯Ã?Â¿Ã?Â½) is wearing a size S
